homeTitle: Sanad | AI Automation for Your Business Growth
homeDesc: Sanad - Specialized AI automation system for SMEs. We help you grow and improve customer service with advanced RAG systems.

hero.title:
Smart Automation
That Grows With Your Business
Working 24/7.
hero.description: We help SMEs transform traditional operations into an intelligent ecosystem. We specialize in building AI agents that support your customer service using advanced RAG systems trained on your data.

solutions.title: Automation Solutions for Modern Enterprises.
solutions.subtitle: We provide you with an AI specialist working inside your business, learning from your data, and nurturing customer relationships automatically.

card1.title: Custom RAG Systems
card1.desc: We build a smart knowledge base from your company's files and procedures to deliver accurate and reliable answers to customers and staff.

card2.title: 24/7 Customer Service Expert
card2.desc: An AI agent that handles inquiries, books appointments, and resolves issues instantly without human intervention.

card3.title: Smart Analytics for Growth
card3.desc: Our system analyzes customer behavior and provides proactive reports to help you make growth decisions based on real data.

specialist.title:
Your Data is
Its Mastermind.
specialist.subtitle: We do not just use generic AI, we build a system that learns from your documents, policies, and business history to offer an exclusive experience for your enterprise.

steps.title: The Journey to Intelligence
steps.subtitle: Three steps to move your enterprise into the era of smart automation.

step1.title: Data Analysis
step1.desc: We study your files and current business procedures to prepare your organization's custom RAG base.

step2.title: Building Custom AI
step2.desc: Developing and training the virtual expert on your data to ensure the highest accuracy in replies and handling.

step3.title: Launch & Expansion
step3.desc: Integrating the system into your communication channels (WhatsApp, Instagram, Website) and starting to monitor your growth.

features.title: Comprehensive Services for Smart Growth.
features.subtitle: We don’t just offer a chatbot, we provide an intelligent work ecosystem.

security.title: RAG Data Privacy
security.desc: Your data is encrypted and secured in a private environment, never used to train public models.

reports.title: Response Quality Reports
reports.desc: Precise monitoring of every conversation to ensure high customer service quality.

integrations.title: Omnichannel Integration
integrations.desc: One expert to respond across WhatsApp, Instagram, and your Website.

api.title: API Interface
api.desc: Advanced API for seamless integration with your existing internal systems.

card.title:
Make your customers
happier.
card.desc: Automation is not just about saving money; it is an investment in service quality and speed.

pricing.title: Plans Fitting Your Ambitions
pricing.subtitle: Choose the optimal plan to move your enterprise to a new level of intelligent efficiency.

footer.brandDesc: Sanad - Your future partner in business automation and AI for SMEs.

newsletter.title: Smart Newsletter
newsletter.desc: Be the first to know about new automation tech to grow your business.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Sanad Business Automation. All rights reserved.

success.title: Success Stories

blog.title: Tech Blog

onboarding.title: Start Building Your Smart Expert Now - Sanad | Onboarding
onboarding.desc: Provide Sanad with your business information and customer characteristics to start building a custom RAG AI system to serve your customers automatically.

sec1.title: Personal Information
sec1.pageSubtitle: Enter your basic details to start building your smart expert
sec1.passwordInstruction: Password must be at least 8 characters, and include at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number.

sec2.title: Business Information
sec2.ordLabel: Do you have an order system?

sec3.title: Technical Information & Knowledge Sources
sec3.uploadText: Drag info file here or click to upload
sec3.tempText: The system will use a professional "communication template" suited for most businesses to ensure friendly and effective responses.

sec4.title: AI Behavior Settings
sec4.fbText: Send text: "I'll verify this and get back to you"
sec4.fbPhone: Ask for phone number to contact later
sec4.submitNote: Once you click submit, we will process your business data and build a trial version of your AI expert within 24 hours.
